sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_data (id UInt64, arr Array(Int32), value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_array_data VALUES (1, [1, 2, NULL], 2), (2, [3, 4, 5], NULL), (3, [NULL, 6], 6);
SELECT id, has(arr, value) AS element_exists FROM test_array_data WHERE has(arr, value) = 1;
SELECT DISTINCT id, has(arr, NULL) AS has_null FROM test_array_data GROUP BY id HAVING has_null = 1;
SELECT id, arr, has(arr, NULL) = 1 AS null_exists FROM test_array_data WHERE arr = (SELECT arr FROM test_array_data WHERE id = 2);
SELECT id, value, has(arr, (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_array_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL)) AS max_exists FROM test_array_data;
SELECT id, value, has(arr, 2) = 1 AND arr[1] = value AS condition_met FROM test_array_data WHERE arr != [];
SELECT id, has(arr, 5) AS five_exists, has(arr, 3) + has(arr, NULL) AS combined_exists FROM test_array_data WHERE five_exists = 0;
SELECT id, has(arr, value) AS value_check FROM test_array_data WHERE has(arr, value) AND value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC;
SELECT id, has(arr, IF(value = 2, NULL, 3)) AS condition_check FROM test_array_data WHERE arr != [0];
